title: Terra-SMP
description: A lightweight, community-focused modpack built for multiplayer fun. Explore new features, discover quality-of-life improvements, and enjoy a cozy, modded Minecraft experience with friends.
body:
# About This Modpack

This modpack was made for our small, **community-driven Minecraft SMP server**! It’s a lightweight setup focused on enhancing exploration, quality of life, and multiplayer fun without overcomplicating things.

While you *can* use it in singleplayer, this is the **main modpack for our server**  

---

Everyone’s welcome to apply and hang out!  
[**Join the Discord Server**](https://discord.gg/6B987ZTx7f)

_Icon by [Champi 1591 on Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/champi_1591/)_
